items.title: NumPy user guide — Broadcasting
items.author: NumPy developers
items.note: Official rules and examples for how NumPy aligns arrays of different shapes during element-wise operations.

items.title: NumPy user guide — Universal functions (ufuncs)
items.author: NumPy developers
items.note: Canonical reference for compiled element-wise functions, broadcasting behavior, and the out parameter.

items.title: NumPy user guide — Quickstart tutorial
items.author: NumPy developers
items.note: Introductory array operations including vectorized arithmetic, indexing, and axis reductions used in ML prep.

items.title: Python Data Science Handbook — Introduction to NumPy
items.author: Jake VanderPlas
items.note: Accessible chapter on ndarray computation, aggregation, and broadcasting with data-science-oriented examples.
